name: French Curled Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Plus 2 tbsp butter or margarine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar, beating well at medium speed with an electric mixer.
3. Add the flour, egg whites, and vanilla; mix well to form a dough.
4. Divide the dough into four equal portions.
5. Place each portion in the center of a greased cookie sheet section.
6. Spread each portion evenly with a spatula to form 4-inch by 3-inch ovals.
7. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 3 minutes or until edges are golden brown.
8. Loosen the cookies with a metal spatula, but leave them on the cookie sheet.
9. Place one cookie upside down on a counter and roll it lengthwise around the handle of a wooden spoon.
10. Remove the rolled cookie and let cool on a wire rack.
11. Repeat the rolling process as quickly as possible with the remaining cookies.
12. If the cookies become too stiff before rolling, briefly return the cookie sheet to the oven to soften them.
13. Continue rolling and cooling the remaining dough.
14. Yield: 3 dozen cookies.
